title: PolicyRuleSet
description: Ordered list of policy rules evaluated against SemanticScore payloads. First matching rule wins.

description.description: Human-readable description of the rule's intent.

authority_below.description: Match if authority score is strictly less than this value.

authority_above.description: Match if authority score is strictly greater than this value.

sensitivity_above.description: Match if sensitivity score is strictly greater than this value.

sensitivity_below.description: Match if sensitivity score is strictly less than this value.

min_confidence.description: Skip this rule if either confidence score is below this threshold.

action.description: Action to take when this rule matches.

log_level.description: Log level for events matching this rule.
